rows.definition: The fak core: the one implementation of abi.Kernel that coordinates adjudication, vDSO lookup, engine dispatch, and result admission across the tool-call path.
rows.distinction: The central COORDINATOR - NOT the gateway (the wire that fronts it) and NOT the engine (one backend it dispatches to).

rows.definition: The kernel-adjudicated wire: the HTTP and MCP-RPC surface that fronts the kernel for non-Go clients, re-validating untrusted wire arguments before they reach it.
rows.distinction: The WIRE / transport - NOT the kernel (the core logic) and NOT serve (the CLI command that launches it).

rows.definition: The inference-engine seam (EngineDriver): the abstract backend interface the kernel dispatches allowed tool calls to (mock, HTTP upstream, fused in-kernel model).
rows.distinction: The dispatch INTERFACE - NOT the model (a specific implementation) and NOT modelengine (the binding that registers the model as an engine).

rows.definition: The tool vDSO: a local fast path (pure registry, content-addressed cache, static table) that answers a tool call with zero engine round-trip.
rows.distinction: The local FAST PATH that bypasses the engine - NOT the kernel (which dispatches all calls) and NOT the gateway (the wire).

rows.definition: The in-kernel inference core: a pure-Go forward pass that runs chat token decode over a loaded GGUF checkpoint across several architectures and quant schemes.
rows.distinction: The decode ALGORITHM - NOT the engine (the dispatch interface) and NOT modelengine (the registration that exposes the model as an engine).

rows.definition: The binding that wires the in-kernel model into the kernel as a registered EngineDriver under the id 'inkernel'.
rows.distinction: The GLUE between model and engine - NOT the model (the algorithm) and NOT the engine (the abstract contract).
gaps: model vs modelengine vs modelroute not yet written into the glossary

rows.definition: The model-routing policy spine: a version-tagged JSON manifest that classifies a tool call by aspect into a plan for which model(s) serve each aspect.
rows.distinction: CHOOSES which model to dispatch to - NOT the adjudicator (which decides WHETHER to allow) and NOT the engine (the dispatch interface).
gaps: model vs modelengine vs modelroute not yet written into the glossary

rows.definition: The cross-engine zero-copy KV co-residence seam: a RegionBackend that maps an external engine's KV cache and fak's args/results into one shared addressable arena.
rows.distinction: CO-LOCATES fak and remote KV in one arena - NOT enginecache (which invalidates a remote cache) and NOT the vDSO (the local tier-2 cache).
gaps: xenginekv vs enginecache not yet written into the glossary
